zh.lifeSummary: 當Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS於1045年出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，她的父親Guillaume d'Eu18歲，母親Adela de Soissons11歲。她和Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes至少有4個兒子和7個女兒。她去世於1118年在法國享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS于1045年出生在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，她的父亲Guillaume d'Eu18岁，母亲Adela de Soissons11岁。她和Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes至少有4个儿子和7个女儿。她去世于1118年在法国享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BLOIS
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille.
French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Troyes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Swiss German Treyer, a cognate of 2 below and 3 below or a variant of Dreyer .

German: variant of Treuer (and, in North America, probably also an altered form of this), in the south a topographic name for someone who lived by a cattle track (Treyen, from Latin trivium ‘trail’), in the north an occupational name derived from Middle Low German troye ‘jerkin’ (compare 5 below). The surname Troyer is very rare in Germany.
Americanized form of Austrian German Trojer: topographic name derived from South German dialect troi ‘cattle track’, a cognate of 2 above.

variants.name: Dreyer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Erwin, Fritz, Johannes, Kurt, Baerbel, Bernhard, Christoph, Claus, Dieter, Ernst, Hedwig.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname derived from German drei ‘three’, Middle High German drī(e), with the addition of the suffix -er. This was the name of a medieval coin worth three hellers (see Heller ), and it is possible that the German surname may have been derived from this word. More probably, the nickname is derived from some other connection with the number three, too anecdotal to be even guessed at now.
North German and Scandinavian: occupational name for a turner of wood or bone, from an agent derivative of Middle Low German dreien, dregen ‘to turn’. See also Dressler .

en.lifeSummary: When Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS was born in 1045, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, her father, Guillaume d'Eu, was 18 and her mother, Adela de Soissons, was 11. She had at least 4 sons and 7 daughters with Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes. She died in 1118, in France, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS est née en 1045, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Guillaume d'Eu, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Adela de Soissons, avait 11 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles avec Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes. Elle est décédée en 1118, à France, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS 1045 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume d'Eu 18 und ihre Mutter Adela de Soissons 11. Sie hatte mit Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1118 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS è nata il nel 1045 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume d'Eu, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Adela de Soissons, aveva 11 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie con Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes. Morì nel 1118, nel Francia, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Litause de Troyes DE BLOISが1045年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Guillaume d'Euは18歳，母Adela de Soissonsは11歳であった。彼女はMilon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyesとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1118年にフランスで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS(이)가 1045년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume d'Eu(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adela de Soissons(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1118년 프랑스에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS nasceu em 1045, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Guillaume d'Eu, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Adela de Soissons, tinha 11 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas com Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes. Ela faleceu em 1118, em França, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS родилась в 1045 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume d'Eu было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Adela de Soissons, 11. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей от Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes. Она умерла в 1118 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 73 лет.

sm.1067-1092: mai le 1067 e o'o I le 1092

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS nació en 1045, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Guillaume d'Eu, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Adela de Soissons, tenía 11 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas con Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes. Murió en 1118, en Francia, a la edad de 73 años.
